final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical exploded-view diagram of a Sony A7 camera showing all internal and external components.

Style/medium: needs a "technical exploded-view" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1980s Japanese electronics service manuals, Dieter Rams Braun product diagrams, 1960s NASA technical illustration; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all components separated and clearly arranged around the central body
Subject: must include all Sony A7 camera components with their names labeled:
  Body/chassis
  Image sensor
  Shutter mechanism
  Mirror box (if applicable)
  Lens mount
  Viewfinder assembly
  LCD screen
  Main circuit board
  Battery compartment
  Memory card slot
  Control dials
  Buttons and switches
  Grip
  Hot shoe
  Ports and connectors
Scene/backdrop: must be clean technical background suitable for diagram clarity
Lighting/mood: needs a clinical, precise technical illustration atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include cutaway and cross-section details showing internal structure
Text (verbatim): must include all component names in Spanish as listed above
Constraints: must preserve accurate Sony A7 camera anatomy, all components must be labeled with their technical names
Avoid:
